other_observers: Brandon Percival, Donna Emmons; Me, Bill Maynard
specific_location: southwest corner of Rose Pond, Chico Basin Ranch
description: This is a long-billed warbler with yellow throat, black auricular, pointing down to distal sides of yellow throat, white supercillium, white eye arc below the eye, white breast with dark broad vertical breast streaks. Bill dark as were feet. Back gray with two broad white wingbars. White neck spot behind black auricular patch.Behaviors: Very sluggish, creeping about on large branch and trunk in nuthatch-like fashion, gleaning insects.Call: None heardPlumage: adult
